title: lobelia subpubera
intro: Lobelia subpubera, also known as Lobelia, is a flowering plant native to North America, belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia subpubera include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce muscle spasms and joint pain. Lobelia subpubera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory health and alleviate various discomforts.
